title: Drawer
description: Panel that slides in from any side of the viewport. Great for filters, settings, details and mobile bottom-sheets. Supports focus trap and scroll lock.

right.title: Right side (default)
right.desc: The default placement. Great for secondary details without leaving the current view.

sides.title: Top and bottom-sheet
sides.desc: Top works well for notifications; bottom mimics mobile bottom-sheet behavior.

form.title: With content (form)
form.desc: The drawer adapts to content — useful for secondary forms and quick edits.
form.drawerDesc: Quick edit for the selected project.

props.side: Side the panel slides in from.
props.size: Size along the panel's main axis.
props.radius: Corner radius (the edge touching the viewport side is not rounded).
props.title: Accessible title — rendered in header when no slot is provided.
props.showClose: Show the close (X) button in the header.
props.color: Accent color applied to border and ring.
props.innerBorder: Subtle inner border inside the panel.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label when there is no title.

slots.header: Replaces the header generated by title/description.
slots.footer: Actions at the bottom of the drawer.
